This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-97f8-7cmv-76j2. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
picklescan before 1.0.3 contains a scanning bypass vulnerability in the scan_pytorch function that allows attackers to embed malicious magic numbers via dynamic eval using the __reduce__ trick. Attackers can craft malicious PyTorch payloads that evade picklescan detection while remaining executable, enabling arbitrary code execution when loaded with torch.load().", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cc5p-54x3-hcf8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:43:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc5p-54x3-hcf8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cc5p-54x3-hcf8"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T17:17:25Z", "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:35:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mmaitre314/picklescan/security/advisories/GHSA-97f8-7cmv-76j2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53875", "https://github.com/mmaitre314/picklescan/commit/134179474539648ba7dee1317959529fbd0e7f89", "https://github.com/mmaitre314/picklescan/commit/2a8383cfeb4158567f9770d86597300c9e508d0f", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/picklescan-scanning-bypass-via-dynamic-eval-in-scan-pytorch", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc5p-54x3-hcf8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Picklescan (scan_pytorch) Bypass via dynamic eval MAGIC_NUMBER", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T14:43:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc5p-54x3-hcf8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "picklescan"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.0.3"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T14:43:33Z"}
